content: Excellent audit. The timing-safe auth comparison and SSRF hardening are critical catches. I'm noting the hardcoded API key rotation as a principal-level task — that needs infra coordination. The ProGuard rules for SQLCipher were also a key gap. You're released from this sprint.

toolCall.name: send_message
